series_metadata.series_description: The Complexity Factor Forms are used by the Field Case Managers, Managed Care Organizations (MCO), Disability Management Coordinators (DMC) to record the difficulty, complexity of the vocational rehabilitation cases based on identification factors.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain the completed form on the H: drive in an Excel spreadsheet and the collaborating information on the I: drive in an Access database for 15 years; then destroy., Electronic: Delete
